title: Collective behaviour
description: Designed for multiple performers. Instructions consider relationships, proximity, unison, and divergence.
context: This piece is designed for multiple performers working in the same space. Instructions should consider the relationships between performers — proximity, mirroring, contrast, call and response, unison, divergence, awareness of each other without direct communication. Each performer receives their own instruction but the conductor is aware of all of them. The piece is interested in what emerges from the interaction of independent but related actions.
